_status: PROPOSED DRAFT - owner must review, edit, ratify (date + sign-off), then load; loads fail closed while status is not RATIFIED. Every cadence below matches a mechanism the code already implements - schedule/ceiling values are the actual defaults currently baked into the source, listed here for visibility and easy retuning.

entries.purpose: Follow-up cadence for an outstanding document request (Agent 08)
entries.schedule: as scheduled by the human/dispatcher calling check_chase_timeout
as scheduled by the human/dispatcher calling request_showing_feedback

entries.purpose: Turnaround SLA for a compliance review (Agent 17)
Response SLA for a HOT-tier lead (Agent 02)
How old a comp can be before it's dropped as stale (Agent 10)
Historic data retention window before 'absent' is the answer (Agent 10)

entries.ceiling: n/a - fixed touch points, not a repeating cadence

entries.purpose: No-shows from the same showing agent, pattern detection (Agent 06)
entries.schedule: counted per showing_agent as showing.no_show events arrive

entries.purpose: Repeated pricing-opinion asks before escalating past a refusal (Agent 10)
entries.schedule: counted per requester as data.request asks arrive
entries.ceiling: 2 asks, then escalate - 1st ask is refuse only (opinion_press_threshold)

entries.purpose: Flagged compliance verdicts from the same submitting agent, pattern detection (Agent 17)
entries.schedule: counted per submitting_agent as flagged verdicts occur, reset after each report
entries.ceiling: 3 flagged verdicts, then a pattern report to the owner (near_miss_pattern_threshold)
